arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta admits Arsenal will have to do 'something special' to turn around their Champions League deficit to Paris Saint-Germain
arts.sum: ISAAN KHAN AT THE EMIRATES: Mikel Arteta insists Arsenal are ready to do 'something special' in Paris next Wednesday to keep their dream alive of reaching a first Champions League final since 2006.

arts.ttl: Luis Enrique says Arsenal have “nothing to lose” ahead of second-leg clash in Paris
arts.sum: Not for the first time this season, Paris Saint-Germain have carved out a one-goal win away to a Premier League side on the European stage. The Ligue 1 champions are…

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta makes honest admission over Arsenal's Champions League second leg at PSG
arts.sum: Arsenal slipped to a narrow defeat to French giants Paris Saint-Germain in the first-leg of their Champions League match-up on Tuesday and Mikel Arteta has spoken out after the result

arts.ttl: Wayne Rooney takes aim at 'subdued' Arsenal fans and claims Mikel Arteta's side are gripped by 'psychological fear' after 1-0 defeat by PSG
arts.sum: Expectations had been high among the Arsenal supporters heading into the game, following their 3-0 demolition of Real Madrid at the Emirates in the quarter-finals.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta orders Arsenal's raging set-piece coach back to the bench during disappointing defeat by PSG
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta had to step in to calm down his set-piece coach in the closing stages of Arsenal 's 1-0 defeat by PSG in the first leg of their Champions League semi-final on Tuesday night.

arts.ttl: ‘We struggled a lot in the first 20 minutes’ – William Saliba reviews Arsenal’s 1-0 defeat to PSG
arts.sum: PSG have defeated Arsenal by the finest of margins in the Champions League semi-finals first leg. France international winger Ousmane Dembélé scored the game’s sole goal early on, diverting Khvicha…

arts.ttl: Arsenal fans lose patience with Martin Odegaard after performance in PSG defeat
arts.sum: Arsenal slipped to a slender defeat to Paris Saint-Germain during the first-leg of their semi-final clash at the Emirates and one player in particular left Gunners fans disappointed

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta ‘disappointed’ as PSG narrowly defeat Arsenal
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta believes Arsenal still have a “big chance” of reaching the Champions League final after his Arsenal fell to a 1-0 defeat to PSG. The Gunners were stunned early on as Ousmane Dembele put a perfectly placed shot in the net just three minutes after the semi-final first leg kicked off. Mikel Merino thought […] The post Mikel Arteta ‘disappointed’ as PSG narrowly defeat Arsenal first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: PSG's Ousmane Dembélé a doubt for return leg against Arsenal
arts.sum: Ousmane Dembélé (27) is a doubt to feature in the second leg of Paris Saint-Germain's UEFA Champions League semi-final against Arsenal next Wednesday, Luis Enrique confirms.

arts.ttl: Arsenal 0-1 PSG: Mikel Arteta must repeat Tottenham trick to turn Champions League semi-final around
arts.sum: Arsenal will have to emulate Tottenham Hotspur if they are to progress to the Champions League final following their 1-0 loss to Paris Saint-Germain at the Emirates.
